title: androrchis × algeriensis
intro: Androrchis × algeriensis, also known as the Algerian hybrid orchid, is a man-made hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Androrchis aetnensis and Orchis italica, both of which are orchid species. This plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots contain saponins, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Androrchis × algeriensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often dried and used in infusions or decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
